title: Strobilanthes linearifolia
taxonomy: Strobilanthes linearifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the acanthus or thistle family. The family Acanthaceae is a part of the larger clade called Asterids, which is one of the two main groups of flowering plants. Asterids are further classified under the clade Angiospermophyta, which includes all flowering plants. The classification of Strobilanthes linearifolia is a part of this broader system of plant classification.
uses: Strobilanthes linearifolia, a plant native to the Western Ghats in India, has been traditionally used in folk medicine.
